title: ComAI – An open-source Linux assistant for troubleshooting with local LLMs
abstract: ComAI – An open-source Linux assistant for troubleshooting with local LLMs is a general-purpose LLM that handles conversation, content generation, analysis, and code. It is the closest thing to a f...
abstract_zh: ComAI – An open-source Linux assistant for troubleshooting with local LLMs 不是一般的AI模型。它能聊、能写、能分析、能编程，是一个真·全能选手。你跟它聊过就知道，这玩意儿比你半个团队还能打。
